name: South of the Border Salad with Honey-Jalapeno Dressing -NHB
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, whisk together vinegar, honey, olive oil, minced garlic, and salt.
2. Stir in the minced jalapeno peppers to taste.
3. Divide the mixed greens between two plates.
4. Layer each plate with kidney beans, chicken breasts, cheese, and tomato.
5. Drizzle with the dressing and serve.
